steps.title: Add to eliminate y
steps.content:
The equations have opposite $y$-coefficients: $+5y$ and $-5y$. Adding the two equations eliminates $y$:
$$(x + 5y) + (x - 5y) = 5 + 7$$
Simplifying:
$$2x = 12$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 6$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
